title: Food Processing Facility Visit
shortDescription: Industrial visit focused on HACCP implementation, hygiene zoning, cold chain management, and quality assurance systems.
fullDescription: Observed end-to-end food processing operations with emphasis on hygiene zoning, sanitation protocols, HACCP implementation, and operational safety practices. Gained practical understanding of cold chain management, storage systems, shelf-life considerations, and quality control measures while studying workflow coordination and food safety management within a commercial processing facility.
keyLearnings: HACCP implementation and food safety systems
Cold chain management and storage practices
Operational safety and production workflow management

title: Industrial Bakery Processing Visit
organization: Cremica & English Oven (Mrs. Bectors Food Specialities Ltd.)
shortDescription: Explored large-scale bakery manufacturing operations including dough preparation, baking, cooling, slicing, and packaging processes.
fullDescription: Gained exposure to industrial bakery production systems covering dough preparation, proofing, baking, cooling, slicing, and packaging operations. Observed automated processing equipment, industrial ovens, dough handling systems, and modern packaging technologies while understanding workflow coordination, production efficiency, and quality assurance practices in large-scale bakery manufacturing.
keyLearnings: Automated dough handling and baking systems

title: Vegetable Processing Plant Visit
shortDescription: Industrial exposure to vegetable processing operations including cleaning, grading, blanching, storage, and packaging systems.
fullDescription: Observed large-scale vegetable processing operations from raw material intake to final packaging. Studied cleaning, grading, blanching, storage, and packaging processes while gaining insight into plant layout, equipment maintenance, workflow organization, and operational efficiency. The visit also highlighted the importance of hygiene practices, raw material handling, and production system management within a food processing environment.
keyLearnings: Industrial hygiene and raw material handling
